suggestions.title: Tabpanels missing aria-labelledby
suggestions.description: Both tabpanel divs (tabpanel-office, tabpanel-dashboard) have role='tabpanel' and id but no aria-labelledby linking them to their tab buttons. Add id='tab-office' and id='tab-dashboard' to the tab buttons, then aria-labelledby='tab-office' / 'tab-dashboard' on the panels.

suggestions.title: App.jsx is 850+ lines — needs component splitting
suggestions.description: App.jsx contains WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, ProgressBar, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton, and App all in one file. Extract at least WorkerCard and StatsBar into their own files. This is a maintainability issue that gets worse every review cycle.

suggestions.title: office-floor role='img' wraps interactive children
suggestions.description: The office-floor div has role='img' but contains Character components with tabIndex={0}. Screen readers will skip interactive elements inside role='img'. Change to role='region' with an aria-label, or remove role='img' entirely.

suggestions.title: workers.json is a flat array — DEFAULT_ROSTER id mismatch
suggestions.description: workers.json is a flat array of objects with 'name' fields but no 'id' fields. App.jsx expects { workers: [...], roster: [...] } with id fields. The code falls back to DEFAULT_ROSTER which uses ids like 'carlos', 'maya' etc. but the actual JSON has no ids. This means ghost detection, desk assignment, and CharacterAvatar matching all rely on DEFAULT_ROSTER fallback rather than actual data. Add 'id' fields to workers.json entries and wrap in { workers: [...], roster: [...] } structure.

suggestions.title: ActivityLog reverses array inline every render
suggestions.description: In ActivityLog, [...entries].reverse().slice(0, 20) creates a new reversed copy on every render. Wrap in useMemo keyed on entries to avoid unnecessary allocations.

suggestions.title: WorkerCard, StatsBar, ProgressBar not memoized
suggestions.description: Office.jsx correctly uses React.memo on Character and CharacterAvatar, but App.jsx components re-render on every 30s poll even when data hasn't changed. Wrap WorkerCard and StatsBar in React.memo.

suggestions.title: CSS data-tooltip not keyboard accessible
suggestions.description: Tooltips on desk occupants use CSS [data-tooltip]::after which only appears on :hover. Characters have tabIndex={0} but no :focus-within tooltip display. Add [data-tooltip]:focus-within::after with same styles as hover.

suggestions.title: Ghost bubble uses IIFE inside JSX
suggestions.description: In Office.jsx, the ghost bubble renders via an immediately-invoked function expression inside JSX (variant === 'ghost' && ghostBubble && (() => { ... })()). Extract to a small GhostBubble component or at minimum a named function for readability.

suggestions.title: Vibe streak resets on every page reload
suggestions.description: sessionStorage resets when tab closes. The streak counter effectively never reaches high tiers for real users. Consider localStorage or remove the feature if it can't meaningfully persist.

suggestions.title: No loading state for Office tab
suggestions.description: Dashboard tab shows LoadingSkeleton during initial fetch, but Office tab shows an empty floor with no indication data is loading. Add a subtle loading indicator or skeleton to the office view.

suggestions.title: No error boundary — bad JSON crashes entire app
suggestions.description: If workers.json returns malformed JSON, the entire app white-screens. Add a React error boundary around the main content area with a friendly fallback UI.

suggestions.title: Confetti z-index blocks header interactions briefly
suggestions.description: The confetti-layer div overlays the entire viewport during the 2.5s animation. If a user tries to click the theme toggle or sync button during confetti, clicks are swallowed. Add pointer-events: none to .confetti-layer.
